raw_consumer_statement: Since XX/XX/2023 I been a victim of fraud with Citi cards. I notified them that charges were made, and I didn't approved them or made them. Citi Cards canceled my cards and send me new ones with different numbers more than 3 times and one time they send me a card with another persons name and I called them to notified them about that issue and they said it was a mistake, that they send me the wrong card. I called so many times to the company and they never fixed the problem. They already affect my credit score because they send me to the credit bureau as if I was not making payments but I am not going to continue making payments on thing I didn't Charge. I even closed the account and they continue making charges. The Citi cards didn't knew what explanation to give me.
